ITranslatableStringRegistryAdd Method (ITranslatableString)

One Identity Manager API Server
Adds a translatable string to the registry. This information can be analyzed to obtain strings that require localization.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
